name: vibe-interface-cli
description: Universal worker-node runtime for coding-agent orchestrators

scripts.test: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', {recursive:true, force:true})" && tsc && node --test dist/test/contract.test.js dist/test/orchestrator.smoke.test.js dist/test/claude.test.js dist/test/symphony.smoke.test.js dist/test/node.test.js dist/test/daemon.test.js dist/test/relay.test.js dist/test/identity.test.js dist/test/encryption.test.js dist/test/monitor-telegram.test.js
